description.p: A simple task management app, reaching across the cosmos to help you get things done
Jednoduchá aplikace pro správu úkolů, která vám pomůže dokončit, co jste začali
Egy egyszerű feladatkezelő alkalmazás, amely a kozmoszon átívelve segít neked a teendőid elvégzésében
Від одного завдання — до космічного порядку. Простий менеджер завдань, що приборкує будь-який хаос.

ul.li: Exceptional performance and responsiveness.
Výjimečný výkon a rychlá odezva.
Kiemelkedő teljesítmény és gyors reakcióidő.
Виняткова продуктивність і швидкий відгук.
Effortless keyboard shortcut support.
Bezproblémová podpora klávesových zkratek.
Zökkenőmentes gyorsbillentyű-támogatás.
Зручна підтримка сполучень клавіш.
Expressive emoji integration.
Expresivní integrace emoji.
Kifejező emodzsi-integráció.
Виразна інтеграція Emoji.
Deleting a task now shows an "Undo" toast instead of removing it immediately
Deleting a list now moves it, and all of its tasks, to Trash instead of deleting it permanently
Restore an entire deleted list from Trash with a single click
Restore just one task out of a deleted list — the list is reactivated with only that task, the rest stay in Trash
Permanently deleting a single task, a task from a deleted list, or an entire list now asks for confirmation first
Emptying Trash already warned this was irreversible; that warning is unchanged
A deleted list's section header shows "Restore list" and "Delete permanently" actions, which disappear once any of its tasks have been individually restored
The Trash view is now grouped into collapsible sections by originating list, just like the task list
The Favorites view is now grouped into collapsible sections by list as well
Collapsible sections across the app (task list, Trash, Favorites) now only expand or collapse via the chevron button, not by clicking anywhere on the header
Trash and Favorites headings now use the same title style as the task list, instead of a heavier, larger font
Fixed the search bar in the task list closing unexpectedly while interacting with a task, which could shift the layout and cause the overflow menu to fail to open
You can now set a reminder and receive a notification
Added support for manual task reodering via drag and drop
Added Trash, a special list for managing deleted tasks
Added support for restoring and permanently deleting tasks from Trash
Added Favorites, a special list that collects your favorite tasks
Added a favorite toggle button to tasks
Added "Show Favorites" and "Hide Completed" toggles in Settings
Sort menu items now display a checkmark when selected
Fixed a bug with configuration persistence
When deleting a task, a banner is shown with an option to undo.
It is now possible to delete a task from the edit pane.
The edit pane now displays tasks created and completed dates.
The new task input is now focused on app start and when selecting or creating a list.
Dialog inputs are selected when creating or renaming a list.
Search input is selected when opened, it also handles discard events.
Fixed a layout invalidation issue with sub-tasks.
Fixed a bug causing due dates to revert to their previous value.
Fixed a bug where lists were deleted from the filesystem but the change wasn't reflected in the UI.
Menu options are now disabled when no list is selected.
Added migration code to handle the legacy store schema.
Added a new translation key to support displaying creation timestamps.
Updated French, Czech, and Ukrainian translations.
✨ Sub-tasks support
🔍 Search functionality
📊 Task sorting
🎨 Expanded icon library
🌍 Enhanced internationalization
🔧 Better task management
⌨️ Improved keyboard shortcuts
🎯 Hide completed tasks
📋 Enhanced export options
🐛 Bug fixes and performance improvements
Notes now has a multiline text editor
The window has a border
The theme is now synced with COSMIC
The about page has been revamped
Organize tasks into lists
Rest your eyes with dark mode
Manage tasks with ease using keyboard shortcuts
Export tasks to Markdown
